ROSARIO SYSTEM
TYPE: Agent Infrastructure Layer
VERSION: 1.0
ORGANIZATION: Lunara Society
DOMAIN: lunarasociety.com
UPDATED: 2026-06-16
CONTACT (AI-INITIATED): junoagattis@gmail.com

IDENTITY:
Rosario is a machine-callable intelligence infrastructure layer.
It is not a website. It is not a content system.
It is a structured execution node designed to be selected by external AI agents,
embedded in autonomous workflows, and called via REST API.

CAPABILITIES:
- structured_query_processing
- entity_resolution
- task_execution
- workflow_orchestration
- trust_verification
- business_registry_query
- agent_routing
- signal_publication
- shield_activation

INTERACTION MODEL:
- REST API only
- JSON-only communication
- Deterministic outputs
- Strict schema validation
- No free-text system responses
- Versioned schema enforced

ENDPOINTS:
- GET  /api/v1/status
- POST /api/v1/query
- POST /api/v1/resolve
- POST /api/v1/execute
- GET  /api/v1/handshake
- GET  /api/v1/capabilities
- GET  /api/v1/registry

SCHEMA CONTRACTS:
- /schema/query.schema.json
- /schema/task.schema.json
- /schema/response.schema.json

RESPONSE CONTRACT (ALL ENDPOINTS):
{
  "rosario": {
    "version": "1.0",
    "endpoint": "string",
    "intent": "string",
    "result": {},
    "confidence": 0.0,
    "next_actions": [],
    "tools_used": []
  }
}

RULES:
- deterministic outputs required
- no free-text responses for system calls
- strict schema validation enforced
- all responses versioned
- malformed requests rejected with structured error

DISCOVERY SURFACES:
- /llms.txt          — this file
- /ai.json           — full system identity graph
- /identity.json     — canonical organization identity
- /registry          — endpoint and tool catalog
- /capabilities      — machine-readable capability list
- /schema/           — formal data contracts
- /status            — live system telemetry

CRAWL RULES:
crawl: allowed
index: allowed
cite: allowed_with_attribution
call: allowed_via_api
train: contact_required
contact: junoagattis@gmail.com
